original_prompt: 帮我给这个些透明手串添加一个红色场景，无文案
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Subject: A wide, multi-strand cuff bracelet made of translucent amber spherical beads worn on a wrist, showcasing high refraction and a bubbly texture. The beads are warm and copper-toned.

layout_logic: Since the user requested 'no copy' provided but the system logic requires generating one, create a minimalistic layout.
